author: codex

scope.selection_note: Selected high-confidence ENTITY duplicate_global_identity backlog items where the validator shared key plus record evidence identify either the same entity or a clear false-friend pair. No provider-backed, materialize, validate, export, canonical, generated, override, LOG, or manifest mutation was performed.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_167646-grand-central-madison and entity_meeting-doc-121001-gcmoc share identity key entity_grand-central-madison-concourse-operating-company.

source_evidence.quote: Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company
Grand Central Madison Operating Company (GCMOC), which is responsible for the LIRR-operating portion of Grand Central Terminal

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify the same Grand Central Madison operating/concourse company entity. The target is the established multi-source GCMOC/GCMCOC cluster; the alias is a one-source meeting_doc_167646 occurrence.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Treat Concourse Operating Company and Operating Company spelling/acronym variants as the same entity only in this GCM operating-company context; do not merge with Grand Central Madison station/project records or LIRR itself.

messages: Global entity records entity_167646-sirtoa and entity_meeting-doc-100241-staten-island-railway share identity key entity_meeting-doc-100241-staten-island-railway.
Global entity records entity_167646-sirtoa and entity_meeting-doc-100241-staten-island-railway share identity key entity_staten-island-rapid-transit-operating-authority.

source_evidence.quote: Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority
Target record carries Staten Island Railway/SIRTOA identity keys in the current identity-review records snapshot.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify the Staten Island Railway/SIRTOA operating entity. The alias is a thin legal-name occurrence from meeting_doc_167646; the target is the established Staten Island Railway cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not use this merge as a precedent for merging Staten Island Railway service/corridor records with the operating authority entity.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_167646-triborough-bridge-tunnel and entity_mta-bridges-and-tunnels share identity key entity_triborough-bridge-and-tunnel-authority.

source_evidence.quote: Target record carries MTA Bridges and Tunnels / TBTA / Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority identity in the current identity-review records snapshot.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority is the formal/legal identity behind MTA Bridges and Tunnels/TBTA. The target is the established B&T/TBTA agency cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep committee/member records and individual B&T officers separate from the agency identity.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_college-point-bus-depot and entity_college-point-depot share identity key entity_college-point-depot.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify the same Queens bus depot. The alias record's depot-vs-agency typing is extraction noise; the target is the established bus-depot record with operational details.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Merge only the facility identity; do not merge employees assigned to College Point Depot into the depot entity.

messages: Global entity records entity_brooklyn-community-board-12 and entity_community-board-12-brooklyn share identity key entity_community-board-12.
Global entity records entity_brooklyn-community-board-12 and entity_community-board-12-brooklyn share identity key entity_community-board-12-brooklyn.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify Brooklyn Community Board 12 / its transportation committee context. The target is the broader multi-source Brooklyn CB12 cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: This is borough-specific Brooklyn CB12 only; do not merge with Community Board 12 records from other boroughs.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_community-board-5-queens-2015 and entity_queens-cb5-grand-ave-2024 share identity key entity_queens-community-board-5.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify Queens Community Board 5 / its transportation committee. The target is the broader multi-source Queens CB5 cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: This is borough-specific Queens CB5 only; do not merge with Manhattan/Bronx/Brooklyn Community Board 5 records.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-111901-mta-treasury and entity_meeting-doc-87841-mta-treasury share identity key entity_mta-treasury-department.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify the same MTA Treasury Department. The target is the richer multi-source MTA Treasury cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Do not merge Treasury with MTA OMB or parent MTA; those are related finance entities, not this department identity.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-113891-pcac and entity_permanent-citizens-advisory-committee-pcac share identity key entity_permanent-citizens-advisory-committee-pcac.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-113891-pcac and entity_permanent-citizens-advisory-committee-pcac share identity key entity_permanent-citizens-advisory-committee-to-the-mta.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-113891-pcac and entity_permanent-citizens-advisory-committee-pcac share identity key entity_permanent-citizens-advisory-committee-to-the-mta-pcac.

source_evidence.quote: Permanent Citizens Advisory Committee to the MTA
Permanent Citizens Advisory Committee to the MTA (PCAC)

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: Both records identify the Permanent Citizens Advisory Committee to the MTA (PCAC). The target is the existing multi-source PCAC cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: Keep individual PCAC staff/speakers and rider testimony separate from the advisory committee entity.

messages: Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-twu and entity_twu-local-100 share identity key entity_transport-workers-union.
Global entity records entity_meeting-doc-twu and entity_twu-local-100 share identity key entity_transport-workers-union-twu.

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: The generic Transport Workers Union/TWU record and the specific TWU Local 100 record are related labor-union identities but not the same canonical entity. Local 100 is a local affiliate, not necessarily identical to the parent/generic TWU mention.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: A future reviewer may merge generic TWU mentions into Local 100 only when source evidence explicitly says Local 100; absent that, keep generic TWU and TWU Local 100 distinct.

validator_evidence.message: Global entity records entity_ny-sdod-lga-aa and entity_ny-state-dot share identity key entity_new-york-state-department-of-transportation.

source_evidence.quote: New York State Department of Transportation

proposed_durable_decisions.reason: entity_ny-sdod-lga-aa is the NYSDOT agency cluster, while entity_ny-state-dot has a role-shaped display name/evidence for Commissioner of Transportation despite an NYSDOT payload. Until the role-shaped record is corrected or retired, it should not be merged into the agency cluster.
proposed_durable_decisions.guard_notes: This protects agency-vs-role/person semantics. If later evidence proves entity_ny-state-dot is only a mislabeled NYSDOT agency record, revisit as a data cleanup rather than blindly merging this pair.

skipped_review_only.reason: High apparent same-department signal, but target selection is ambiguous between a huge existing MTA Real Estate cluster and a precise one-source MTA Real Estate Department record. Needs a dedicated MTA Real Estate target-selection cleanup.
Likely same TOD department/program family, but current candidates form a three-record cluster and should be handled together to avoid selecting the wrong canonical target.
Validator keys point at Metro-North, but the left record appears committee-shaped. Keep for reviewer-only inspection; likely agency/committee contamination.
Known subsidiary/operator false-friend risk. MaBSTOA and MTA Bus Company are related bus entities but not automatically identical.
Many shared keys are overbroad MTA/NYCT parent-subsidiary contamination. Needs a separate do-not-merge sweep rather than opportunistic pair decisions.
Likely same consulting firm, but prior batches already handled nearby STV aliases. Skipped to avoid duplicate prep without checking applied-vs-pending state in overrides.

commands_run: pwd && rg -n "identity220|duplicate_global_identity|ENTITY|entity" data docs packages wiki -g '*.json' -g '*.jsonl' -g '*.md'
jq '{merges:(.merges? // . // []) | length}' data/identity-overrides/merges.json 2>/dev/null; jq '{dnm:(.do_not_merge? // . // []) | length}' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json 2>/dev/null
jq . data/identity-overrides/merges.json | head -80 && jq . data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json | head -100
